mapper.insert: insert into aiw_system_config (biz_id, config_group, config_key, environment, value_type, config_value, description, status, version, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{configGroup}, #{configKey}, #{environment}, #{valueType}, #{configValue}, #{description}, #{status}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update value_type = values(value_type), config_value = values(config_value), description = values(description), status = values(status), version = values(version), updated_at = values(updated_at)
